mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC for FEDFUNDS changes remains below 0.02 over all 3-year rolling windows, or forward returns show no statistical significance (p > 0.10) across 10,000 bootstrap samples.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 9.0 percent indicates severe labor market deterioration and imminent recession, triggering institutional portfolio de-risking and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns remain positive in 70 percent of months where UNRATE exceeds 9.0, or the signal fails to predict direction with accuracy above 55 percent in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer spending strength, driving corporate revenue growth and positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 65 percent of triggered instances, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.05) in multivariate regression over a 5-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a monetary easing cycle reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and easing supply constraints, generating short-term positive momentum in equity markets.
failure_condition: The signal predicts negative returns in 60 percent of cases when FEDFUNDS is declining, or the 5-day forward return correlation with INDPRO growth falls below 0.05 in the specified regime.

mechanism_narrative: A consumer price index level above 215 signals entrenched inflation that forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity markets deliver positive 20-day returns in over 65 percent of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 215, or the threshold effect disappears when controlling for earnings growth.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases aggregate household income and consumer spending power, directly boosting corporate earnings and driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The 60-day forward return correlation with PAYEMS growth remains below 0.03 across all rolling 3-year windows, or the signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark in backtesting.

mechanism_narrative: High real GDP growth combined with elevated inflation indicates demand-pull price pressures that trigger aggressive monetary tightening, reducing discount rates and producing negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields positive forward returns in 70 percent of observations, or the combined signal shows no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) in out-of-sample validation.

mechanism_narrative: An industrial production index falling below 90.0 marks a contraction in manufacturing output that signals immediate supply chain bottlenecks and inventory shortages, triggering short-term equity sell-offs.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are positive in 60 percent of months where INDPRO drops below 90.0, or the threshold signal loses directional accuracy below 52 percent in walk-forward testing.
